text: Would you turn in your best friend for committing murder (they confess to you) for $500,000?
Would you push a stranger off a bridge to stop a train from hitting 5 people for $0?
Would you know the exact date and time of your death for $1 million?
Would you erase all memories of your dead loved ones to stop the grief for $2 million?
Would you lie under oath to save an innocent person from life in prison (you'd commit perjury) for $0?
Would you steal expensive medicine to save your dying child (the company refuses to help) for $0?
Would you sacrifice 1,000 random people to end world hunger forever for $0?
Would you let an innocent person serve 10 years in prison instead of you (you committed the crime) for $5 million?
Would you leak classified government secrets that expose war crimes but endanger soldiers for $10 million?
Would you erase your partner's traumatic childhood memory without asking (they suffer daily) for $500,000?
Would you clone yourself knowing the clone would be conscious, self-aware, and potentially suffer for $20 million?
Would you see a 10-second preview of your death (how and where) for $2 million?
Would you punch your parent in the face (full force) for $1 million?
Would you save your dog or a stranger's toddler from a burning building (can only save one) for $0?
Would you hear every lie ever told to you (replayed in your mind) for $750,000?
Would you take credit for a coworker's cancer cure (they'd be forgotten, you'd be famous) for $20 million?
Would you press a button that kills a random person you'll never know for $50 million?
Would you live in a Matrix-style simulation (perfect life, aware it's fake) while your real body suffers for $0?
Would you have the power to read minds but never turn it off (hear everyone's thoughts 24/7) for $10 million?
Would you become immortal (never age, can't die) but watch everyone you love die over centuries for $0?
Would you cure all diseases but 2 billion random people die instantly (Thanos-style) for $0?
Would you frame a known child predator (they're guilty of other crimes) for murder to put them away for life for $2 million?
Would you know exactly what everyone truly thinks about you (unfiltered thoughts) for $300,000?
Would you give up your only child for adoption (never see them again) to save 1,000 orphans for $0?
Would you sell military secrets to a hostile nation causing American soldier deaths for $100 million?
Would you release a serial killer who will kill again to save 10 innocent hostages for $0?
Would you erase your worst memory but also lose your best memory (can't choose) for $1 million?
Would you remove free will from all humans to eliminate suffering, crime, and war for $0?
Would you go back in time and kill baby Hitler (knowing you'd erase millions of lives, including WWII heroes) for $0?
Would you genetically engineer future humans without sadness, anger, or fear (only positive emotions) for $25 million?
Would you tell your best friend their spouse is cheating (ruins their marriage, they have 3 kids) for $500,000?
Would you live 500 years completely alone (no human contact ever) or die tomorrow with loved ones for $20 million?
Would you die today (organs harvested) to save 5 people (your family gets $10 million) for $0?
Would you lie to your dying mother that her estranged son forgives her (he doesn't, but she'd die in peace) for $0?
Would you create superintelligent AI that will surpass and possibly replace humanity for $100 million?
Would you know with 100% certainty if your current partner will cheat on you in the future for $200,000?
Would you ban all organized religion worldwide but achieve permanent world peace for $0?
Would you genetically engineer your unborn child to be a genius (IQ 180) but emotionally stunted for $5 million?
Would you testify against your brother in court (he's guilty, faces 20 years) for witness protection and $1 million?
Would you erase all art, music, and literature from existence but cure all cancer forever for $0?
Would you relive your most traumatic day every year on the anniversary for $300,000 annually?
Would you become an authoritarian dictator (must execute dissenters) but bring prosperity to your nation for $0?
Would you see a countdown above everyone's head showing when they'll die for $2 million?
Would you take a pill that makes you permanently happy but removes your ability to perceive truth for $0?
Would you sabotage your worst enemy's business (they go bankrupt, 500 employees lose jobs) for $3 million?
Would you redistribute all global wealth equally (everyone gets $35,000/year, no rich or poor) for $0?
Would you expose a company's illegal pollution (causes cancer) knowing 30,000 workers lose their jobs for $15 million?
Would you guarantee your child becomes a billionaire but they'll never experience failure, rejection, or hardship for $0?
Would you eliminate all national borders and languages (everyone speaks one language) but lose all cultural diversity for $0?
Would you live a meaningful life in poverty (happy but broke) or a meaningless life in luxury (depressed but rich) for $50 million?
